notes: Localhost-only companion service handles PII anonymization and deanonymization.
Authentication relies on a shared local secret header.
Model warmup may download user-selected models only when explicitly enabled.

rule_rationale.architecture_boundaries: Deferred until the browser extension or additional packages create clearer cross-module boundaries worth enforcing.
rule_rationale.trust_boundary_validation: Enabled because the localhost API is the main trust boundary for auth, body parsing, CORS, session handling, and optional model warmup/download flows.
rule_rationale.sensitive_logging: Enabled because the primary privacy contract depends on never logging raw PII, secrets, or vault contents while still allowing sanitized traces.
rule_rationale.observability_minimums: Deferred until the repo defines stronger production-facing telemetry minimums beyond the current structured trace baseline.
rule_rationale.risky_change_notes: Enabled because auth, vault, logging, networking, and model download changes materially affect privacy and operational risk.
